data.body: Consideration: [Reliability] Sub-agent nesting gate coverage gap — the primary detection method (Agent tool availability) fires correctly when brainstorm is dispatched as a Task-tool sub-agent, but does NOT fire when brainstorm is invoked inline by an orchestrator that passes through Agent tool access (e.g., debug-everything reading brainstorm SKILL.md inline). The gate implementation must handle both paths: check both Agent tool availability AND the orchestrator dispatch signal ('You are running as a sub-agent') described in CLAUDE.md. (taxonomy: consumer_impact)
